test_cases.question: Casual leave carry forward karne ke rules kya hain?
retrieved_context:
3. Casual Leave & Carry Forward Rules
Casual Leaves (CL) are intended for short-term, personal, or urgent domestic requirements. Employees
are allotted 12 Casual Leaves per year, allocated on a pro-rata basis for new joiners.
Carry Forward Limit: Under the standard company benefits scheme, employees are permitted to carry
forward a maximum of 15 unused casual leaves into the next calendar year. Any additional remaining
leaves beyond this limit will automatically expire.
Please note that Casual Leaves cannot be combined with Earned Leaves unless explicitly approved by
the local HR representative under exceptional personal emergencies. Casual leaves cannot be encashed
at the time of separation.

Acme Corp India
Standard Operating Procedures: Employee Leave Manual
1. Purpose & General Guidelines
Welcome to the Acme Corp Employee Leave Manual. This document outlines the standard rules,
guidelines, and parameters governing leave policies for all full-time employees operating in Indian
locations. The objective is to ensure structured, balanced PTO (Paid Time Off) tracking and compliance
with regional labor laws.
All leaves must be planned in advance where possible and applied for via the online Employee
Self-Service (ESS) Portal. Unauthorized absence or failure to register leave requests might lead to a loss
of pay and potential disciplinary review.
test_cases.generated_answer: Casual leave carry forward karne ke liye, employees ko agle calendar year mein maximum 15 unused casual leaves carry forward karne ki permission hai. Is limit se zyada bachi hui koi bhi additional leaves automatically expire ho jayengi.
test_cases.ground_truth: Employees ko agle calendar year mein maximum 15 unused casual leaves carry forward karne ki permission hai. Is limit se zyada bachi hui koi bhi additional leaves automatically expire ho jayengi.

test_cases.question: कंपनी की लीव पॉलिसी के तहत हम कितनी छुट्टियां कैरी फॉरवर्ड कर सकते हैं?
retrieved_context:
2. Annual Sick Leave & Earned Leave Allotments
Every employee is credited with a set number of Sick Leaves (SL) and Earned Leaves (EL) at the start of
each calendar year. These leaves are designed to safeguard your health and provide rest and
recuperation time.
Earned Leaves (EL): Full-time employees are allotted 18 Earned Leaves per year, accrued monthly at a
rate of 1.5 leaves per month. Earned leaves can be accumulated up to a maximum limit of 45 days. Any
accruals beyond 45 days will lapse automatically.
Sick Leaves (SL): Employees receive 12 Sick Leaves annually. For medical absences extending beyond
3 consecutive days, a valid medical certificate signed by a registered medical practitioner must be
uploaded to the ESS Portal upon returning to work.

4. Maternity, Paternity, and Bereavement Policies Acme Corp is committed to supporting employees through major life events. We offer progressive family support leaves structured as follows: Maternity Leave: Female employees are eligible for 26 weeks of fully paid Maternity Leave in accordance with the Maternity Benefit Amendment Act. This can be availed up to 8 weeks prior to the expected date of delivery. Paternity Leave: Male employees are entitled to 10 consecutive business days of fully paid Paternity Leave. This leave must be utilized within 6 months of the child's birth date, after which the leaves will lapse. test_cases.generated_answer: Casual leave carry forward karne ke liye, employees ko agle calendar year mein maximum 15 unused casual leaves carry forward karne ki permission hai. Is limit se zyada bachi hui koi bhi additional leaves automatically expire ho jayengi.
test_cases.ground_truth: कंपनी की पॉलिसी के अनुसार, कर्मचारी अगले साल में अधिकतम 15 बिना इस्तेमाल की गई कैजुअल लीव्स (casual leaves) कैरी फॉरवर्ड कर सकते हैं।
